title: GrievanceHub Analysis Report
question: Can management cancel previously approved annual leave without an emergency?
known_facts: Leave was approved in writing two weeks before travel.

report.research_draft_notice: This analysis is a research starting point, not legal advice. Review all citations before using it in a grievance.
report.your_question: Can management cancel previously approved annual leave without an emergency?

quick_assessment.summary: Sample issue regarding cancellation of approved annual leave.
quick_assessment.why: Assessment based on retrieved authorities and stated facts only.

key_contract_violations.why_relevant: Supports the stated leave cancellation issue.
key_contract_violations.direct_quote: Employees who have annual leave approved are entitled to such annual leave except in emergency situations.

management_limiting_authority.why_relevant: Management may argue operational needs justify schedule changes.
management_limiting_authority.direct_quote: Management retains the right to assign work.

supporting_evidence.direct_quote: Employees who have annual leave approved are entitled to such annual leave except in emergency situations.
supporting_evidence.how_to_use: Compare management's stated reason against contract language.

supporting_evidence.what_it_supports: Written leave approval notice showing pre-approved dates
supporting_evidence.how_to_use: Obtain from the grievant and attach to the grievance file.

statements: Request reinstatement of approved leave if facts confirm a violation.

detailed_analysis.grievance_framework: Dispute frame: Management canceled previously approved annual leave without citing an emergency.

strategic_tips.title: Confirm missing fact
strategic_tips.text: Obtain and document whether leave was previously approved in writing.
